matching_diagnosis: Metastatic carcinoma with bone marrow involvement (leukoerythroblastosis)
differential_reasoning: Small-cell carcinoma of the lung is a specific metastatic carcinoma and is semantically encompassed by the broader differential item describing metastatic carcinoma with bone marrow involvement.

The LLM recommends initiating goals-of-care discussions, which is the opposite of delaying them.
